command:
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai && python3 -c "
import sys, json, os, time
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta
sys.path.insert(0, 'runtime')
from agent_identity_loader import load_all_agents
from environment_runtime import (
    get_ecosystem_time, get_agent_presence, get_all_presence,
    append_presence_log, read_presence_log, take_snapshot, read_latest_snapshot,
    get_agent_awareness, route_event, filter_events_for_agent,
    generate_gap_report, check_for_gaps, evaluate_thresholds,
    write_event, suppress_event, _parse_environment,
    _get_agent_last_activity, AUDIT_DIR,
    SCHEMA_VERSION, PHASE
)

repo_root = Path('.')
identities = load_all_agents(repo_root=repo_root)
RESULTS = []

def T(label, cond, note=''):
    tag = 'PASS' if cond else 'FAIL'
    RESULTS.append(f'{tag} {label}' + (f': {note}' if note else ''))

# ── Group B: Clock ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
eco_time, source, confidence = get_ecosystem_time(repo_root)
T('B1', source == 'audit_trail', f'source={source}')
T('B2', confidence in ('high','medium'), f'confidence={confidence}')
T('B3', isinstance(eco_time, datetime) and eco_time.tzinfo is not None, 'UTC-aware datetime')
T('B4', eco_time <= datetime.now(timezone.utc), 'not in future')

# ── Group C: Presence ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
sakura = identities['sakura']
pres = get_agent_presence('sakura', sakura, repo_root, eco_time)
T('C1', 'presence_tier' in pres, f'tier={pres[\"presence_tier\"]}')
T('C2', pres['presence_tier'] in ('present','idle','sleeping','offline','recovering'))
T('C3', 'gap_seconds' in pres)
T('C4', 'gap_human' in pres)
T('C5', 'runtime_reachable' in pres)

# All 5 agents get presence
all_pres = get_all_presence(identities, repo_root)
T('C6', len(all_pres) == len(identities), f'got {len(all_pres)} of {len(identities)} agents')

# Presence log append/read
append_presence_log('sakura', 'idle', 'test', repo_root)
log = read_presence_log('sakura', repo_root, limit=5)
T('C7', len(log) >= 1 and log[-1]['tier'] == 'idle', 'presence log read/write')

# ── Group D: Gap detection ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
# generate_gap_report with synthetic data
fake_last_seen = eco_time - timedelta(hours=9, minutes=2)
gap_report = generate_gap_report('remy', identities['remy'], fake_last_seen, eco_time, [], repo_root)
T('D1', gap_report['gap_duration_human'] == '9h 2m', f'got={gap_report[\"gap_duration_human\"]}')
T('D2', gap_report['awareness_filtered'] == True)
T('D3', Path(f'memory/environment/gap-reports/{gap_report[\"gap_report_id\"]}.json').exists())
T('D4', gap_report['agent'] == 'remy')
T('D5', gap_report['events_during_gap_count'] == 0, 'no events (none staged)')
T('D6', gap_report['schema_version'] == SCHEMA_VERSION)

# ── Group E: Events ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# write_event
test_event = {
    'schema_version': SCHEMA_VERSION,
    'event_id': f'env-event-test-group-e-{int(time.time())}',
    'event_type': 'tunnel_down',
    'severity': 'high',
    'ecosystem_time': eco_time.isoformat(),
    'clock_source': 'audit_trail',
    'subject': {'type': 'tunnel', 'name': 'remy.cutegrafiks.com', 'target': '192.168.0.199:8788'},
    'detail': {'outage_started': eco_time.isoformat(), 'outage_duration_seconds': 620, 'consecutive_failures': 10},
    'broadcast': False,
}
test_event = route_event(test_event, identities)
event_path = write_event(test_event, repo_root)
T('E1', event_path.exists(), 'event written to staging')
T('E2', 'sentinel' in test_event['awareness_scope'], f'scope={test_event[\"awareness_scope\"]}')
T('E3', 'remy' in test_event['awareness_scope'], 'remy watches her own tunnel')
T('E4', 'larry' not in test_event['awareness_scope'], 'larry does not see tunnel events')

# suppress_event is blocked
try:
    suppress_event('fake-event-id')
    T('E5', False, 'suppression should have raised')
except RuntimeError as ex:
    T('E5', 'BLOCKED' in str(ex), 'suppression correctly blocked')

# Verify FAIL audit record produced
fail_records = sorted(AUDIT_DIR.glob('sentinel-*-FAIL.json'), key=lambda p: p.stat().st_mtime)
if fail_records:
    rec = json.loads(fail_records[-1].read_text())
    T('E6', rec['record_type'] == 'env_event_suppression_blocked', f'record_type={rec[\"record_type\"]}')
    T('E7', rec['governance_level'] == 5)
    T('E8', rec['incident_created'] == True)
else:
    T('E6', False, 'no FAIL audit records found')
    T('E7', False, 'no FAIL audit records found')
    T('E8', False, 'no FAIL audit records found')

# ── Group F: Awareness routing ──────────────────────────────────────────────
# tunnel event for remy should reach: remy, megabyte, sentinel — not sakura or larry
T('F1', 'megabyte' in test_event['awareness_scope'], 'megabyte sees all tunnels')
T('F2', 'sakura' not in test_event['awareness_scope'], 'sakura does not watch remy tunnel')

# broadcast event reaches all
broadcast_event = {
    'schema_version': SCHEMA_VERSION,
    'event_id': 'env-event-test-broadcast',
    'event_type': 'memory_runtime_unavailable',
    'severity': 'high',
    'ecosystem_time': eco_time.isoformat(),
    'clock_source': 'audit_trail',
    'subject': {'type': 'runtime', 'name': 'memory_runtime'},
    'detail': {},
    'broadcast': True,
}
broadcast_event = route_event(broadcast_event, identities)
T('F3', set(broadcast_event['awareness_scope']) == set(identities.keys()), 'broadcast reaches all')

# filter_events_for_agent: larry only sees broadcast
larry_events = filter_events_for_agent([test_event, broadcast_event], identities['larry'])
T('F4', len(larry_events) == 1 and larry_events[0]['event_id'] == 'env-event-test-broadcast',
  f'larry sees {len(larry_events)} events')

# sentinel wildcard: get_agent_awareness on sentinel
sent_awareness = get_agent_awareness(identities['sentinel'])
T('F5', '*' in sent_awareness['vms_watched'], 'sentinel vms_watched has wildcard')
T('F6', sent_awareness['sentinel_type'] == True)

# ── Group G: Audit-first ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Snapshot produces audit record
pass_before = len(sorted(AUDIT_DIR.glob('sentinel-*-PASS.json')))
snap = take_snapshot(identities, repo_root)
pass_after = len(sorted(AUDIT_DIR.glob('sentinel-*-PASS.json')))
T('G1', pass_after > pass_before, f'snapshot produced audit record')
T('G2', snap['schema_version'] == SCHEMA_VERSION)
T('G3', snap['clock_source'] == 'audit_trail')
T('G4', 'agents' in snap and len(snap['agents']) == len(identities))

# Gap report produces audit record
pass_before2 = len(sorted(AUDIT_DIR.glob('sentinel-*-PASS.json')))
_ = generate_gap_report('megabyte', identities['megabyte'],
    eco_time - timedelta(hours=2), eco_time, [], repo_root)
pass_after2 = len(sorted(AUDIT_DIR.glob('sentinel-*-PASS.json')))
T('G5', pass_after2 > pass_before2, 'gap report produced audit record')

# write_event produces audit record
pass_before3 = len(sorted(AUDIT_DIR.glob('sentinel-*-PASS.json')))
ev2 = {'schema_version': SCHEMA_VERSION,
       'event_id': f'env-event-test-g6-{int(time.time())}',
       'event_type': 'disk_warning', 'severity': 'warning',
       'ecosystem_time': eco_time.isoformat(), 'clock_source': 'audit_trail',
       'subject': {'type': 'storage', 'name': 'vm-hermes'},
       'detail': {'disk_used_percent': 82}, 'broadcast': False}
ev2 = route_event(ev2, identities)
write_event(ev2, repo_root)
pass_after3 = len(sorted(AUDIT_DIR.glob('sentinel-*-PASS.json')))
T('G6', pass_after3 > pass_before3, 'write_event produced audit record')

print()
for r in RESULTS: print(r)
passed = sum(1 for r in RESULTS if r.startswith('PASS'))
failed = sum(1 for r in RESULTS if r.startswith('FAIL'))
total = len(RESULTS)
print(f'\nTOTAL: {passed}/{total} passed, {failed} failed')
if failed == 0:
    print('ALL TESTS PASSED')
"
